goal: Unify the app-facing gold-red visual theme more broadly and fix Esc-based skip behavior in StoryScreen without changing gameplay logic or story content.
constraints: Do not modify battleV2 gameplay logic, card rules, or balance numbers.
Do not change story text or story branching content.
Limit edits to theme tokens and the relevant presentation screens/components.
Keep existing navigation and screen flow intact.
deliverables: The global app-facing theme reads more gold-red instead of blue-black in the main shell.
StoryScreen responds to Escape as a skip/continue shortcut while preserving existing typing and navigation behavior.
Build passes after the UI-only changes.
